Title: Date Literals
Description: Virtuoso does not support bare date literals or the DATE reserved keyword.
Literal dates must be enclosed in a conversion function such as stringdate().
Type casts may also be used to explicitly instruct Virtuoso to treat a string as a date.
Examples:
select * from demo.demo.orders o
where o.orderdate between stringdate('1994-01-01') and stringdate('1997-12-31');
